basic_details.job_title: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand IT Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 29 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand
basic_details.short_information: Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand (MCDHJ) IT Executive Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand. A total of 29 vacancies have been announced through the MCDHJ IT Executive Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: General: 40 years, EWS: 40 years, OBC: 42 years, Female Unreserved: 43 years, ST/SC: 45 years. PH Category: 45-50 years.
age_limit.details: General/EWS: 40 years OBC (BC-I & BC-II): 42 years Female Unreserved: 43 years ST/SC: 45 years Age relaxation of 5 years for PH category.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Computer Science/IT/ECE/EEE), M.C.A., M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT), 5 years post qualification experience in IT/Software Development/IT System, 2 years experience as project manager
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: BE/B.Tech (Computer Science/IT/ECE/EEE) / M.C.A. / M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT). Experience: Post qualification 5 years experience in IT/Software Development/IT System and worked as a project manager for 2 years. Skills: Project Management/Project Delivery, good team leader skills, deep knowledge of programming skills like JAVA, .NET etc. Knowledge of Testing tools, SDLC, STQC, Hardware Software, Networking, Data Centre etc.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IT Executive post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IT Executive post is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the IT Executive position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 29 vacancies announced for the IT Executive position by the Medical College and District Hospital Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the IT Executive role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BE/B.Tech in Computer Science/IT/ECE/EEE, MCA, or M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT, along with specific experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the IT Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by category, with a general upper limit of 40 years and relaxations for OBC, Female Unreserved, ST/SC, and PH categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the IT Executive post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the IT Executive post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the IT Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IT Executive recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the experience required for the IT Executive post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have 5 years of post-qualification experience in IT/Software Development/IT System and 2 years of experience as a project manager.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application start?
faq.answer: The online application for the IT Executive post will commence on 12 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
